title: AIT : Supplementaries
description: Adds a variety of different datapack additions to the Adventures in Time mod.
body:
**NOTICE TO RETURN DOWNLOADERS:** If you have downloaded this datapack before and are returning to download the new update you will need to redownload both the datapack AND the resourcepack.
Most of the features of this datapack WILL NOT WORK with out the resoucepack.

AIT : Supplementaries is a Datapack for the Adventures in Time mod which adds more customization features. This is a early build so it does not add a whole bunch right now but more is planned in the future. I'm a one person team so don't expect a lot of frequent activity.

**CURRENT FEATURES:**
* Hellbent interior
* Newbury (4th doctor) sonic
* Brass (dark eyes) sonic
* Sonic Torch (redstone torch)
